_comment: Tier-2 for kratos iga#: catalog listed 'SurfaceLoadCondition' as an IGA Element. It is (a) a Condition not an Element, and (b) needs a shape suffix (3D3N / 3D4N from StructuralMechanicsApplication). The bare-name 'SurfaceLoadCondition' fails CreateNewElement and CreateNewCondition with 'is not registered'. The Shell3p/5p elements work fine. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
